result.reason: The custom full-screen toolbar does not implement dragging to exit full-screen mode, which deviates from standard Windows UI behavior for restoring maximized windows by dragging their title bar.
result.approach: Implement custom drag logic (mouse down, mouse move, mouse up event handlers or WndPoc override) for the FullscreenToolbar to detect dragging, call FullscreenHandler.Value = false to exit full-screen, and reposition the main form accordingly.
